ns0:entry.ns0:title: 00-Evan/shattered-pixel-dungeon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/00-Evan/shattered-pixel-dungeon
Language: java
Shattered Pixel Dungeon is an open-source traditional roguelike dungeon crawler with randomized levels and enemies, and hundreds of items to collect and use. It's based on the source code of Pixel Dungeon, by Watabou.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anuken/Mindustry
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anuken/Mindustry
Language: java
The automation tower defense RTS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AutoMQ/automq
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AutoMQ/automq
Language: java
Diskless Kafka® on S3. 10x Cost-Effective. No Cross-AZ Traffic Cost. Autoscale in seconds. Single-digit ms latency. Multi-AZ Availability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GeyserMC/Geyser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GeyserMC/Geyser
Language: java
A bridge/proxy allowing you to connect to Minecraft: Java Edition servers with Minecraft: Bedrock Edition.

URL: https://github.com/JabRef/jabref

The most widely used, high performance Minecraft server that aims to fix gameplay and mechanics inconsistencies

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/cassandra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/cassandra
Language: java
Open source transactional distributed database. Linear scalability and proven fault-tolerance on commodity hardware or cloud infrastructure without compromising performance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iflytek/skillhub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iflytek/skillhub
Language: java
Self-hosted, open-source agent skill registry for enterprises. Publish & version skill packages, govern with RBAC and audit logs, deploy on-premise with Docker or Kubernetes.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: qaiu/netdisk-fast-download
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/qaiu/netdisk-fast-download
Language: java
聚合多种主流网盘的直链解析下载服务, 一键解析下载，已支持夸克网盘/uc网盘/蓝奏云/蓝奏优享/小飞机盘/123云盘等. 支持文件夹分享解析. 体验地址: https://lz.qaiu.top https://189.qaiu.top

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
